payload.project_name: Access-A-Ride Primary Carrier Service Option Years
payload.description: Exercise of Option years (April 1, 2025 – March 31, 2027) for three Primary Carrier contracts (PTM Management Corp., NY Paratransit Group, AMR All-Transit LLC) for Access-A-Ride paratransit service. Total funding: $243,607,696.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Modification to the contracts in order to exercise the Option years for the provision of Access-A-Ride Primary Carrier Transportation Service for Paratransit.
